digest.component_or_area: Gerrit project.config Autosubmit label + vote ACLs
propositions: Author a project-defined Autosubmit label (-1..+1, function NoBlock, empty copyCondition) in project.config as a non-gating, non-sticky opt-in land request.
Grant the label-Autosubmit vote ACL via two lines to Contributors and Administrators on refs/heads/*, mirroring the LLM-Review/Verified pattern.
Ensure the Autosubmit label is not referenced by any submit requirement so it cannot weaken the two-vote (LLM-Review + Verified) gate.
Capture a pre-cutover access baseline snapshot committed alongside the label add, then diff post-cutover access to confirm only the two new grants were added.
Record a security-invariant header comment inline in project.config explaining the non-gating design and the deliberate name collision avoidance with Gerrit's first-party autosubmit plugin.
Update setup-project.sh so its refs/meta/config push commit message names the Autosubmit label and ACL addition for the audit trail.
